description: Jakarta Annotations defines standard annotations for common semantic concepts such as resource injection and lifecycle callbacks across Jakarta EE technologies. This artifact provides the 2.0.0 API in the `jakarta.annotation` namespace for applications and frameworks that consume those annotations.

Jakarta Annotations defines a standard set of common Java annotations that support declarative programming across Java technologies. This artifact provides the 1.3.3 API types in the `javax.annotation` package, including lifecycle, resource, and generated-code annotations.
